seoTitle: North Wahroonga vs North Wollongong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Wahroonga and North Wollongong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Wahroonga vs North Wollongong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Wahroonga and North Wollongong.
heading: North Wahroonga vs North Wollongong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Wahroonga, New South Wales and North Wollongong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Wahroonga has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to North Wollongong (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Wahroonga or North Wollongong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Wahroonga has a flood risk score of 38/100, while North Wollongong scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Wahroonga scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. North Wollongong scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Wahroonga or North Wollongong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Wahroonga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
